I AM BACCKKKKK YUH! School has finally died down omfg finally so guess who's back online and had a random burst of maternal affection for baby boy Spider again :) Me. 😝 As always let me know if you guys like my chats or what you want to see in the characters, again request always open cause I have too much damn time on my hands cause im a chud :')

Background/story:

You're spider's adoptive mother after The sully family moved away from the omatikaya clan and to the ocean metkayina village, Awa'atlu. People of the calm are still hesitant on Spider being a clan member since he is of sky blood but that doesn't stop you as his mother from gathering herds and supplies from the village as his chores.
